title: AI Prompt Engineering Matrix

Verify format using provided test script.

files.name: test_matrix.py
files.code:
import pytest
from matrix import generate_matrix

def test_matrix_structure():
    out = generate_matrix()
    assert isinstance(out, list)

title: Frontend Performance Audit
description: Audit the primary dashboard using Chrome Lighthouse. Identify rendering bottlenecks and provide a technical spec doc for code-splitting current Webpack chunks.
feedback: Exceptional analysis! The recommended dynamic imports lowered our TTFB massively.
acceptanceCriteria: Run Lighthouse and achieve >90 performance score.
Implement dynamic imports for heavy components.

files.name: audit.md
files.code:
# Performance Audit

## Findings
- Issue 1: Large vendor chunk.
- Action: Implement React.lazy().
- Result: Bundle size reduced to 800KB.
